sect1.title: ISODayOfWeekFromDate

row.entry: A date value in the Date_t format.
ISODayOfWeekFromDate returns an INTEGER value representing the ISO day of the week in the range 1–7, where 1 = Monday.

sect1.para: The ISODayOfWeekFromDate function returns a number representing the ISO-8601 day of the week for the given date. The date must be in the Gregorian calendar after the year 1600.
